# TASK002 - Refresh Memory-Bank State

**Status:** Completed  
**Added:** 2026-04-05  
**Updated:** 2026-04-05

## Original Request

Update the memory bank.

## Thought Process

The initial scaffold correctly described the repository at bootstrap time, but
it no longer captured the strongest active context. The worktree now includes
significant `.planning` artifacts, especially a closed Phase 031 architecture
program and prepared Phase 032 crypto-audit planning. The correct memory-bank
update was therefore to review every memory-bank file, compare it against the
current repository evidence, and refresh the continuity documents so future
sessions understand the active planning state.

## Implementation Plan

- Re-read every file under `.github/memory-bank`
- Inspect current repository change state for active high-signal work
- Update the continuity files that had drifted behind the repository state
- Record this refresh as a completed task
